## Summary
Storytelling squad covering mythic structure, screenwriting, personal narrative, business storytelling, presentations, brand narrative, improvisation, pitching/frame control, and movement narrative. 11 world-class experts across narrative domains.

## Key Frameworks
- Hero's Journey / Monomyth (Campbell)
- Story Circle 8 steps (Harmon)
- Save the Cat 15-Beat Sheet (Snyder)
- Story Grid + Five Commandments (Coyne)
- Five-Second Moment + 5 Stakes Tools (Dicks)
- 4 Stories Every Business Needs (Hall)
- Sparkline + S.T.A.R. Moment (Duarte)
- ABT Framework + Story Cycle System (Howell)
- Status Transactions + Yes And (Johnstone)
- STRONG Method + Frame Control (Klaff)
- Public Narrative Self/Us/Now (Ganz)
